commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e4556d67929ae3148c9472549f353895cd36c3e5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the MS Teams reply stream controller and tests to trim already-streamed text on failed fallbacks and suppress the SDK final create for streamed replies at or above 4000 characters.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +286. Total +316 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced bug: source inspection shows streamFailed remains latched while reply-dispatcher sends later payloads through preparePayload, so later segments can be trimmed by stale emittedTextLength. No for the claimed live >4000-character fix: the latest discussion reports a negative production check and lacks branch-specific Teams proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This draft needs author or maintainer rework plus real Teams proof; automation cannot supply the contributor’s live Teams evidence or choose the final metadata tradeoff safely.
